creator: antonvesnin@gmail.com
text:
Hello!
It is a problem with bold fonts in some kdelibs applications, sometimes 
something appear near the letters, other QT (non-kde) apps like opera works 
okay. 
I don't know how to describe this problem better, see the scrennshot. This 
isn't a permanent problem, after restarting problem application it works ok, 
but after some time this problem appear again.

Pleace see the screenshot here: http://img405.imageshack.us/my.php?image=kdeprwd7.png
